_meta.source: Stopgap. 2014 SRD spells are used as the base for the 2024 spell pool. Revisions and additions per SRD 5.2 to be added as sourced.

schema.revised: Object keyed by spell index. Each value is a partial spell object that is deep-merged onto the 2014 base entry, overriding fields like `desc`, `higher_level`, `damage`, etc.
schema.added: Object keyed by spell index. Each value is a full spell entry (same shape as a 2014 SRD spell) for spells that exist only in SRD 5.2.
schema.removed: Array of spell indices to drop from the merged list (e.g. spells WotC removed from the 2024 spell list).
